rules.trade_description: PHI 2028 R1 protected 1-8. If 9-30 it conveys to BRK and enters the main swap pool (BRK, PHI, PHX, NYK). BRK gets the most/two most favorable of the four. If PHI is the least favorable of {BRK, PHI, PHX}, WAS competes against it: better goes to WAS, absolute worst goes to PHX.
